overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V depicting a first-person perspective walking along a highway overpass shoulder. The scene features moderate vehicle traffic, chain-link fencing, and views of highway interchanges and distant urban infrastructure under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway shoulder with chain-link fence barrier

events.description: white SUV passes by in the left lane
large tour bus passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to the chain-link fence

notable_agents.action: tour bus driving past in the left lane

entered.detail: green metal chain-link safety fence running along the highway edge
low concrete wall supporting the chain-link fence
tall street lights lining the left side of the highway
hazy city buildings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated highway shoulder with a green chain-link fence on the right. Vehicles including a white SUV and a large tour bus pass by in the left lanes. Street lights line the highway and a hazy urban skyline is visible in the distance under bright afternoon sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange overlook view through chain-link fence

events.description: camera turns right to look through the chain-link fence at the highway interchange below

agents.ego_description: stopped or slowed to observe the highway interchange and ramps below through the fence

entered.detail: multi-level highway ramps and overpasses visible below
large advertising billboard standing near the interchange
palm trees growing near the highway interchange
tall downtown buildings visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to look through the chain-link fence, revealing a complex highway interchange with multiple ramps and levels below. A billboard and palm trees are visible near the interchange, with distant skyscrapers rising in the hazy background. Vehicles can be seen moving on the lower highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with dense roadside vegetation

events.description: camera turns back to forward direction and resumes walking along the highway
vegetation on the right becomes significantly denser with bushes and trees

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the highway shoulder, passing various vehicles including sedans and SUVs

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in the left lane

entered.detail: thick bushes and small trees growing alongside the fence
tall street lights lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: Resuming the forward walk along the highway shoulder, the camera passes various vehicles while the chain-link fence returns to the right side. The roadside vegetation becomes increasingly dense with bushes and trees. Street lights continue to line the left side of the highway as the journey continues toward the distant city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along an elevated highway shoulder that shifts from a focus on passing traffic to a panoramic view of urban infrastructure. It begins by moving past a green chain-link fence as a white SUV and a large tour bus speed by under a bright afternoon sun, with a hazy skyline looming in the distance. As the camera turns right, the perspective shifts through the fence to reveal a complex multi-level highway interchange populated by palm trees, billboards, and distant skyscrapers. The scene then returns to a forward trajectory along the shoulder, passing more vehicles as the roadside environment transforms from open concrete to increasingly dense bushes and trees. Finally, the camera continues its steady progress toward the city, flanked by a line of street lights and the persistent boundary of the chain-link fence.
